An apartment complex?
[Comments recommending this place]
[Korean Beef 1++ Grade No.9]
Can she eat all of that?
I'm worried
[Don't Worry]
[18 servings?]
[Be Happy]
[Terrified]
I'll stop here
Hello everyone
I'm here at Apgujeong-dong apartment complex
There's a butcher shop here that's been here for 30 years
And they also did KBBQ for 10 years
It doesn't look like there will be a KBBQ restaurant here
They will take reservations 1-2 weeks prior

I got in contact with them earlier
I was told they opened early today, so I can come by before their reservation table comes in
I got very lucky
[Apgujeong Miwoo]
There are a lot of different meats I see 9
I will order them all
Excuse me
1 steak tartare,
1 beef tongue,
And 300g of every meat on this menu
[Pause]
Is she eating that alone?
[Almost]
Not sure if I memorized it correctly, but
Beef tongue,
Neck chain,

Hanging tender,
Outside skirt,
Striploin, Ribeye roll,
Chuck Flap Tail,
Tenderloin
Can you eat all of this?
I don't think this is enough
16 servings total including the steak tartare
If you include the brisket, it's 18 servings
Steak tartare? Amazing
Thank you
Take a look at the brisket
I'll start with the tartare
I'm so hungry
Thank you
So delicious

[Beef tongue]
First time cooking beef tongue
I see that it's scored on top
Amazing
I wonder if it will taste good
This meat is a bit hard for me to eat
I think that's good enough
If the color changes, it's good to eat
It looks like this
Looks like regular meat
The texture isn't like beef or pork
But I like the texture
It doesn't smell weird or anything
So tasty
I was told to try the green onion sauce
Put it on top

Gelatinous? Chewy?
It's something I've never had before
So good
[Neck chain]
Now for the 2nd plate
Let's eat

There's no fat
The color looks ready
It's good to eat, right?
Dip it in salt
So soft and chewy
The smell is strong

I don't usually like these parts
Tasty
Maybe I did a good job grilling it It's so delicious
Thank you
[Fueling for her]
I don't think he does that for any other customers
I give them cups
Let's cook this a bit rare
It's so satisfying to eat a perfectly grilled meat
What's that?
So yummy
It smells amazing
Thank you
This kimchi looks so good
What? Why is it so good?
[Outside skirt]

Outside skirt?
Yes, if you put it on the grill We will cut it for you
We can serve this cut up or as a whole
These meats can't be eaten raw, right?
You can eat the neck chain raw
But it's hard to eat other meats with fat
Too bad I already finished the neck chain
I would've tried it raw
All the meats have different textures
So it's best to eat them in order
Thank you Is this ready?
This is the outside skirt
I don't think I've had it separately like this
All the meat I ate so far so very chewy and al dente
[Cleaning up the grill]
So chewy

Next plate Hurry!
[Striploin ]
Amazing

Looks yummy
I'm so excited
Striploin
I don't think I've ever had this
[It's perfectly cooked]
I know what a ribeye should taste like, but not the striploin
The difference is..
What was I going to say?
What is this? Digestive pills
It's okay
I don't need it

It smells similar to the ribeye
But it's more elastic
Same grease level
This has more texture
It's definitely more chewy
Green onion
On top

[Ribeye roll]
This right here is the cap
This is like the tuna belly if I were to make a comparison
It's the most tender part
Save it for last
Thank you
Bon appetit
It just melted in my mouth

All around your mouth
And it disappears

A whole new world
Amazing

Weird

Don't breathe with your nose
Can't believe I didn't know about this combination in my 25 years of life
A quick brisket break
It's irresistible
I've been wanting to eat the brisket
Let's eat it as it is
With some salt
So good
So much smoke
The brisket
Not just your average greasy brisket,
The fat is very chewy
It has that chewy texture
You definitely need to try it
It's very different from other briskets
Excuse me,

Do I just cook this?
It looks like a shrimp
This is the greasiest part of the cow
This goes very well with the wasabi
With some salt first
This has its own distinct texture

Very jelly-like

It has its texture

Juicy

This is my favorite
